name: Fake Compliance
text: A company trained a frontier model at a declared facility while maintaining the appearance of compliance. The prohibited training ran alongside legitimate workloads during off-hours. The finished model was quietly transferred to a subsidiary abroad.
image-prompt: A split scene showing a clean official compliance report on a desk and, behind a hidden door, a vast humming server hall running at full capacity in a neighboring warehouse, stark contrast between bureaucratic neatness and industrial scale, digital painting, no text
